pi_items.source: Extracted DICOM metadata using pydicom from the real sample data (0002.DCM/0003.DCM) downloaded from rubomedical.com by setup_weasis.sh
Extracted DICOM metadata using pydicom from the real sample data (0002.DCM/0003.DCM) downloaded from rubomedical.com by setup_weasis.sh

privileged_info_summary: The data used in this task is a real medical image sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM or 0003.DCM). Extracted DICOM metadata confirms the actual Patient Name is 'Rubo DEMO' and the Modality is 'XA' (X-Ray Angiography), explicitly contradicting the task.json claims of 'Metadata^Test' and 'CT' which are only used in a fallback scenario.
